name: Oatmeal Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together well.
2. Add the egg, vanilla flavoring, lemon flavoring, and milk to the mixture. Stir until combined.
3. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking soda.
4. Mix the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture until thoroughly combined. If necessary, use your hands to work in the dry ingredients.
5. Shape the dough into rolls and wrap them in waxed paper or foil.
6. Store the rolls in the refrigerator until ready to bake.
7. When ready to bake, slice the rolls thinly and place them on a greased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit until lightly browned.
